title: galium javanicum var. pulneyense
intro: Galium javanicum var. pulneyense, also known as Galium pulneyense, is a variety of the Galium javanicum plant species, which belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the Western Ghats region of India and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Galium pulneyense include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestive health. The herbal preparations of Galium pulneyense include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various health conditions.
